category_sources: source_facts.description says "Terminal UI OS (Terminal Multiplexer)"; official docs describe a terminal window manager with workspaces, tiling layouts, and automation.
display_name_sources: Official hosted docs page uses the TUIOS name; source_facts.name is "tuios".
docs_sources: Official GitHub README says full documentation is available at tuios.gaurav.zip and in the repository docs folder.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/Gaurav-Gosain/tuios; per instruction, repo is returned as null and not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a terminal multiplexer; official README/docs list TUI, session management, tiling, keybindings, and tape scripting.
